prompt: I want to add zaps to my Nostr client so users can tip each other with Lightning. I also heard about something called nutzaps with Cashu — should I support those too? Walk me through what NIPs I need.
assertions: Response discusses NIP-57 for Lightning zaps
Response explains the LNURL callback for sending zap requests
Response discusses lud16 or LNURL or allowsNostr for LNURL integration
Response covers NIP-61 for nutzaps or Cashu-based zaps
Response covers kind:10019 nutzap mint recommendation
